message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam maxMessageSize 200

title 解析处理@EnableTransactionManagement注解

participant "ConfigurationClassPostProcessor" as CCPP
participant "ConfigurationClassParser" as CCP
participant "ComponentScanAnnotationParser" as CSAP
participant "AdviceModeImportSelector" as AMIS
participant "TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector" as TMCS
participant "ConfigurationClass" as CC
participant "ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader" as CCBDR
participant "AutoProxyRegistrar" as APR
participant "AopConfigUtils" as ACU

CCPP -> CCP : postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry
CCP -> CCP : parse(AnnotationMetadata metadata, String beanName)
CCP -> CCP : processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)
CCP -> CCP : doProcessConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass, SourceClass sourceClass)

alt [当前被解析的Class被@ComponentScan标注，进行扫描]
  note over CCP : @ComponentScan扫描
  CCP -> CSAP : parse(AnnotationAttributes componentScan, final String declaringClass)
  CSAP -> CCP : parse(String className, String beanName)
  CCP -> CCP : processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)逐行解析扫描到的类
  CCP -> CCP : processImports(configClass, sourceClass, getImports(sourceClass), true)

  note over CCP,AMIS : 获取到AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
  CCP -> AMIS : selectImports(AnnotationMetadata)
  AMIS -> TMCS : selectImports(AdviceMode)

  note over CCP,APR : 逐归处理AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
  note over CCP : 添加AutoProxyRegistrar、AspectJAutoProxyRegistrar到关联配置类\n（即标记@EnableTransactionManagement的类）\n的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrars属性中
  CCP -> APR : addImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar

  note over CCP : 按照普通配置类处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
  CCP -> CC : processConfigurationClass
  CC -> CCP : 解析完配置类
end

note over CCPP,CC : 加载配置类的配置信息
CCPP -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitions
CCBDR -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitionsForConfigurationClass
CCBDR -> CCBDR : registerBeanDefinitionForImportedConfigurationClass

note over CCBDR : 如果是由配置类导入的，直接注册到beanfactory

note over CCBDR,ACU : 处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration，导入了切面BeanFactoryTransactionAttributeSourceAdvisor
note over CCBDR : 加载@Bean标记的注册方法
CCBDR -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitionsForBeanMethod

note over CCBDR : 处理@ImportResource
CCBDR -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitionsFromImportedResources

note over CCBDR,ACU : 处理AutoProxyRegistrar，注册了InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
note over CCBDR : 处理@Import，导入的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar类
CCBDR -> CCBDR : loadBeanDefinitionsFromRegistrars
CCBDR -> CCBDR : registerBeanDefinitions

note over ACU : 注册InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
ACU -> ACU : registerAutoProxyCreatorIfNecessary

@enduml
